name: Category A
descr: Best fatigue detail — plain parent metal and full-penetration butt welds (AS 5100.6 §13.5 Table 13.5.1)

name: Category B
descr: High-quality butt welds with defined finish and inspection

name: Category C
descr: Butt welds at changes of section — typical transverse stiffener attachment

name: Category D
descr: Fillet welds — load-carrying welds and partial penetration butt welds

name: Category E
descr: Fillet or butt welds at attachments — cover plates and gussets (AS 5100.6)

name: Category F
descr: Intermittent fillet welds or welds at cope holes

name: Category G
descr: Worst fatigue detail — welds at mechanical holes or at stress concentrations
